enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Chapter VI - Financial Conduct and Prohibited Activities ....................................................

These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Commercial Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of these Directions, 'Commercial Banks' means banking companies
(other than Small Finance Banks, Payment Banks, and Local Area Banks),
corresponding new banks, and the State Bank of India, as defined respectively under
clauses (c), (da), and (nc) of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
enriched_requirements.object: Small Finance Banks, Payment Banks, and Local Area Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State Bank of India, as defi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that,
(1) directions contained in paragraph 35 pertaining to entering into forward
contracts for underlying sale of Gold / Silver / Platinum shall be applicable
only to commercial banks authorized to deal in gold;
enriched_requirements.object: commercial banks authorized to deal in gold

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) directions contained in paragraph 36 relating to reporting of corporate bond
transactions shall apply on to Primary Dealers;
enriched_requirements.object: Dealers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) directions contained in paragraph 65 relating to obtention of statement of
immovable property from officer employees shall be applicable only to Private
Sector Banks.
enriched_requirements.object: Private Sector Banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
<image>
(1) 'Act' means the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (10 of 1949);
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: <image> (1) 'Act' means the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (10 of 1949)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(2) 'DICGC' means the Deposit Insurance and Credit Guarantee Corporation
established under Section 3 of the Deposit Insurance Corporation Act, 1961.
enriched_requirements.object: Credit Guarantee Corporation established under Section 3 of the Deposit Insurance Corporation Act, 1961

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions, unless defined in the corresponding chapter, shall have the
same meaning as have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act,
1934, or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or any statutory modification or re-
enactment thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by the RBI, or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or any statutory m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have separate Board-approved policies relating to the following areas,
as applicable:
(1) making of donations, in line with instructions contained in paragraph 49 of
these Directions;
enriched_requirements.object: relating to the following areas, as applicable: (1) making of donations, in line with instructions contained in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of a bank shall fulfill the following responsibilities, if applicable:
(1) extend facility of deferment of option premium only after conducting due
diligence of users in accordance with its Board approved policy in this regard,
as set out in paragraph 38 of these Directions;

The Board of a bank shall review and update policies in respect of 'mandatory leave'
as set out in paragraph 61 of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of 'mandatory leave' as set out in paragraph 61 of these Directions
to them below: (1) 'Committee' means the Committee constituted under the Fund
to as the Scheme

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Liquidator' means liquidator of a bank appointed under any law for the time
being in force;
enriched_requirements.object: appointed under any law for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'Principal amount' means the amount, including interest, transferred by a bank
to the Fund in terms of Section 26A of the Act;
enriched_requirements.object: transferred by a bank to the Fund in terms of Section 26A of the Act

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'Amount due' means any credit balances in any account or any deposit in a bank
remaining unclaimed or inoperative for ten years or more;
enriched_requirements.object: any account or any deposit in a bank remaining unclaimed or inoperative for ten years or more

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall credit to the Fund the credit balance in any of the following deposit
account maintained with the bank which have not been operated upon for ten years
or more, or any amount remaining unclaimed for ten years or more, which shall
include:
(1) savings bank deposit account;
enriched_requirements.object: the credit balance in any of the following deposit account maintained with the bank which have not been operated upon for ten years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(12) such other amounts as may be specified by RBI from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: A bank shall deposit the amounts to be credited to the Fund in the
specified account maintained with RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: be credited to the Fund in the specified account maintained with RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall transfer to the Fund the entire amount as specified in the above
paragraph, including the accrued interest that the bank would have been required to
pay to the customer / depositor as on the date of transfer to the Fund.
enriched_requirements.object: the entire amount as specified in the above paragraph, including the accrued interest that the bank would have been required to p

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any amount payable in foreign currency under an instrument or a transaction, that
has remained unclaimed for ten years or more, shall at the time of transfer to the
Fund be converted into Indian Rupees at the exchange rate prevailing on that date
and in the event of a claim, the Fund shall be liable to refund only the Indian Rupees
received by the Fund with respect to such instrument or transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: transfer to the Fund be converted into Indian Rupees at the exchange rate prevailing on that date and in the event of a claim, the Fund

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any expenditure incurred for the promotion of depositors' education, awareness,
interests and other purposes that may be specified by RBI under Section 26A (4) of
the Act, shall be charged to the Fund.
enriched_requirements.object: Fund

conditions:
in case of deceased
depositors) whose unclaimed amount / deposit had been transferred to the Fund
if applicable
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of demand from a customer / depositor (or legal heirs in case of deceased
depositors) whose unclaimed amount / deposit had been transferred to the Fund, a
bank shall repay the customer / depositor, along with interest if applicable, and lodge
<image>
a claim for refund from the Fund for an equivalent amount paid to the customer /
depositor.
enriched_requirements.object: depositor, along with interest if applicable, and lodge <image> a claim for refund from the Fund for an equivalent amount paid to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The interest payable, if any, from the Fund on a claim shall accrue only from the date
on which the balance in an account was transferred to the Fund to the date of
payment to the customer / depositor.
enriched_requirements.object: date on which the balance in an account was transferred to the Fund to the date of payment to the customer / depositor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
No interest shall be payable in respect of
amounts refunded from the Fund, in respect of which no interest was payable by the
bank to its customer / depositor.
enriched_requirements.object: of amounts refunded from the Fund, in respect of which no interest was payable by the bank to its customer / depositor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of a claim for refund of foreign currency denominated deposit accounts,
instruments or transactions specified in paragraph 11(11) and 12, irrespective of
whether a bank has paid the depositor or customer in Indian Rupees or foreign
currency, the bank shall be entitled to claim refund of the eligible amount from the
Fund, in Indian Rupees only.
enriched_requirements.object: refund of the eligible amount from the Fund, in Indian Rupees only

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall calculate the interest payable (by a bank to its depositors / claimants) on
principal amount of unclaimed interest bearing deposits transferred to the Fund at the
rate of 4 percent per annum up to June 30, 2018, 3.5 percent w.e.f.
enriched_requirements.object: (by a bank to its depositors / claimants) on principal amount of unclaimed interest bearing deposits transferred to the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
July 1, 2018 up
to May 10, 2021 and at 3 percent with effect from May 11, 2021 till the time of payment
to the depositor / claimant.
enriched_requirements.object: 3 percent with effect from May 11, 2021 till the time of payment to the depositor / claimant

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Changes to the rate of interest, if any, payable on the
principal amount transferred to the Fund shall be specified by RBI from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The amount of interest payable in this behalf shall be calculated in the
manner specified in paragraph 16 of these Directions and by rounding off the amount
of interest to the nearest rupee.
enriched_requirements.object: manner specified in paragraph 16 of these Directions and by rounding off the amount of interest to the nearest rupee

conditions:
if any claim is received from depositors whose deposits were covered
by DICGC insurance at the time of transfer to the Fund
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of a bank under liquidation, during the pendency of the liquidation
proceedings, if any claim is received from depositors whose deposits were covered
by DICGC insurance at the time of transfer to the Fund, the Fund shall pay to the
liquidator, an amount equal to the amount that could have been claimed from DICGC
with respect to such deposits, and with respect to all other amounts paid by the
<image>
liquidator towards the amounts transferred to the Fund, whether insured by DICGC
or not, the Fund shall reimburse the liquidator.
enriched_requirements.object: an amount equal to the amount that could have been claimed from DICGC with respect to such deposits, and with respect to all ot

conditions:
If the deposits of a
customer / depositor were covered by DICGC insurance at the time of transfer
to the DEA Fund
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: In the case of a bank under liquidation, the depositor has to approach
the Liquidator of the bank for claim and the Liquidator shall settle the claim as per the
following procedure:
(1) Scenario 1: Claim on Deposits Covered by DICGC - If the deposits of a
customer / depositor were covered by DICGC insurance at the time of transfer
to the DEA Fund, then the Liquidator can claim an amount equivalent to what
could have been claimed from DICGC, and then make payment to the depositor.
enriched_requirements.object: per the following procedure: (1) Scenario 1: Claim on Deposits Covered by DICGC - If the deposits of a customer / depositor were c

conditions: If the above deposit amount is more than the insurance cover of DICGC
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the above deposit amount is more than the insurance cover of DICGC, then
the Liquidator shall claim the amount in excess of DICGC insurance cover only
on reimbursement basis i.e., the Liquidator shall pay such amount to the
depositor subject to meeting all the applicable requirements and thereafter
submit a claim to DEA Fund for reimbursement.
enriched_requirements.object: excess of DICGC insurance cover only on reimbursement basis i

conditions:
if not already registered under the DEA
Fund Module of the e-Kuber system
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Registration in e-Kuber System: A bank, if not already registered under the DEA
Fund Module of the e-Kuber system, shall expeditiously register itself as a pre-
requisite to remit the unclaimed amounts due and submit refund claims, as defined in
the Scheme, in electronic form through e-Kuber system.
enriched_requirements.object: a pre- requisite to remit the unclaimed amounts due and submit refund claims, as defined in the Scheme, in electronic

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A member bank, i.e., a bank
with direct access to the e-Kuber system, shall share two e-mail ids with
dea.fund@rbi.org.in to complete the registration process while a non-member bank
shall provide two e-mail ids to its sponsor bank to complete the registration process.
enriched_requirements.object: with dea

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
On completion of registration process, further communication from RBI shall be sent
only to the two e-mail ids registered in the e-Kuber system.
enriched_requirements.object: the two e-mail ids registered in the e-Kuber system

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Authorised Signatories: A bank shall designate up to a maximum of 10 officers as
authorised signatories to operate the bank's DEA Fund account jointly, who shall be
responsible for authorising the applicable returns under the DEA Fund Scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: maximum of 10 officers as authorised signatories to operate the bank's DEA Fund account jointly, who shall be responsible for author

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It
shall submit to RBI a certified true copy of the Resolution / Decision / Authorisation
(in Hindi or English) of the Board / MD&CEO / ED / Committee of Executives
empowered for the purpose along with the list of authorised signatories.
enriched_requirements.object: certified true copy of the Resolution / Decision / Authorisation (in Hindi or English) of the Board / MD&CEO / ED / Committee of Execu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any update
in the authorised officials shall be furnished in the prescribed format (Annex I), with
details of both Resolution / Decision / Authorisation and specimen signatures of all
the authorised signatories.
enriched_requirements.object: prescribed format (Annex I), with details of both Resolution / Decision / Authorisation and specimen signatures of all the authori

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: A bank, while communicating the changes made, shall ensure to submit
details of all such authorised signatories and their specimen signatures to RBI,
instead of furnishing only the additions or deletions made.
enriched_requirements.object: of all such authorised signatories and their specimen signatures to RBI, instead of furnishing only the additions or deletion

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure for Transferring Unclaimed Amount to the Fund: A bank shall transfer
to the Fund, the amounts becoming due in each calendar month (i.e., proceeds of the
inoperative accounts and balances remaining unclaimed for 10 years or more) as
specified in paragraph 12 of these Directions, i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: the amounts becoming due in each calendar month (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before transferring the amount due to the Fund, the bank shall
ensure that all legal obligations relating to the same, till that date, including those
pertaining to taxes deductible and payable, are met or adequate arrangements are
made for the same.
enriched_requirements.object: obligations relating to the same, till that date, including those pertaining to taxes deductible and payable, are met or adequat

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) Member Bank's Own Account - A member bank shall transfer to the Fund, the
entire amount due through e-Kuber system under the module "DEA Fund
Services".
enriched_requirements.object: the entire amount due through e-Kuber system under the module "DEA Fund Services"

conditions: When a member bank is crediting amount due to the Fund
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
When a member bank is crediting amount due to the Fund, it shall
furnish its DEA Fund Code in the "Bank DEA Fund Code" field and the detailed
breakup (number of accounts and amount) of the deposits, viz., interest bearing
deposits, non-interest bearing deposits and other credits, which also includes
non-interest bearing amount (i.e., any amount other than deposits remaining
<image>
unclaimed as defined in paragraph 11 of these Directions), in the fields provided
for the same in the e-Kuber system.
enriched_requirements.object: Code in the "Bank DEA Fund Code" field and the detailed breakup (number of accounts and amount) of the deposits, viz

conditions:
In case a sponsor bank is remitting
the amounts due of non-member banks
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Other Bank's (Non-member) Account - In case a sponsor bank is remitting
the amounts due of non-member banks, it shall not consolidate but separately
remit the amount bank-wise to the Fund, by indicating appropriate Bank DEA
Fund Code of the other (non-member) bank in the field provided in the e-Kuber.
enriched_requirements.object: the amount bank-wise to the Fund, by indicating appropriate Bank DEA Fund Code of the other (non-member) bank in the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall also provide the detailed break-up (number of accounts and amount) of
the deposits, viz., interest-bearing deposits, non-interest bearing deposits and
other credits in the respective fields, i.e., the fields designated for the same, in
the e-Kuber system.
enriched_requirements.object: break-up (number of accounts and amount) of the deposits, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Window for transferring unclaimed amount and submission of claim
(1) Deposit Window: A bank shall ensure correctness of the amount and
transfer unclaimed amounts / deposits to the Fund through e-Kuber during
the last five working days of every month.
enriched_requirements.object: amount and transfer unclaimed amounts / deposits to the Fund through e-Kuber during the last five working days of every mont

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank (including a non-member
bank) shall effect only one transfer of unclaimed amounts per month.
enriched_requirements.object: of unclaimed amounts per month

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A non-
member bank shall transfer the unclaimed amounts / deposits to its sponsor
bank (through normal banking channel), sufficiently in advance of the due
date, to enable the sponsor bank to transfer the same to the Fund through e-
Kuber system.
enriched_requirements.object: / deposits to its sponsor bank (through normal banking channel), sufficiently in advance of the due date, to enable the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Claim Window: A bank shall ensure correctness of the amount and submit
claim from the Fund in e-Kuber system during the first 10 working days of
every month.
enriched_requirements.object: amount and submit claim from the Fund in e-Kuber system during the first 10 working days of every month

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall submit only one consolidated claim per month.
enriched_requirements.object: claim per month

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A
non-member bank shall submit the claim to its sponsor bank sufficiently in
advance of the due date, to enable the sponsor bank to submit the same to
RBI through e-Kuber system.
enriched_requirements.object: its sponsor bank sufficiently in advance of the due date, to enable the sponsor bank to submit the same to RBI through e-Kuber sys

conditions: In case of demand from a customer / depositor
if applicable
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure for Submitting Claim
(1) In case of demand from a customer / depositor, whose unclaimed amount /
deposit had been transferred to the Fund, a bank shall repay the customer /
depositor, along with interest, if applicable, and thereafter, lodge a claim for
<image>
refund from the Fund for an equivalent amount paid to the customer / depositor.
enriched_requirements.object: depositor, along with interest

conditions:
In case of any claim made by the customer / depositor for refund of only part
amount

if any) in the
account
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of any claim made by the customer / depositor for refund of only part
amount, the bank shall repay the customer accordingly by making the account
operative and keep the remaining amount (including the interest, if any) in the
account, and thereafter lodge a claim for the entire amount from the Fund.
enriched_requirements.object: by making the account operative and keep the remaining amount (including the interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: A bank may refer to Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025 for operational guidelines on
activation of inoperative accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: of India (Commercial Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025 for operational guidelines on activation of inoperat

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall submit a printout of the auto generated Form II signed by
the authorised officials and certified by the bank's auditors (internal / concurrent)
to RBI, by e-mail and/or by post, within three working days of its submission on
the e-Kuber system.
enriched_requirements.object: the auto generated Form II signed by the authorised officials and certified by the bank's auditors (internal / concurrent) to RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank / non-member bank shall also submit a copy of
the latest half-year Form III (Reconciliation Certificate - Annex VII) and Annual
Certificate (Annex VIII), while submitting the first claim during the half-year /
year, as the case may be, along with the claim form - Form II, else it will result
in non-consideration of claim of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: of the latest half-year Form III (Reconciliation Certificate - Annex VII) and Annual Certificate (Annex VIII), while submitting the

conditions:
In case of claims from the
Fund by a non-member bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of claims from the
Fund by a non-member bank, RBI will credit the account of the sponsor bank
and the sponsor bank shall credit the same to the non-member bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the non-member bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, the onus of making correct refund claims from the
Fund shall lie solely with the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: bank

conditions:
in case of
refund claims in Form II
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) While a bank is not required to provide the customer-wise details in case of
refund claims in Form II, it shall maintain the customer-wise details of claims at
its end, duly certified by its auditors (internal/concurrent), which RBI may seek
at a later stage / during the supervisory review process.
enriched_requirements.object: of claims at its end, duly certified by its auditors (internal/concurrent), which RBI may seek at a later stage / d

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have an appropriate internal operational procedure for the Fund which
should specifically address error prevention mechanisms and rectification processes.
enriched_requirements.object: operational procedure for the Fund which should specifically address error prevention mechanisms and rectification proces

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, the bank shall implement a Maker-Checker process to verify all deposit
and claim entries for processing the entries.
enriched_requirements.object: to verify all deposit and claim entries for processing the entries

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall immediately report to RBI any errors, including:
enriched_requirements.object: any errors, including:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall submit in original (unless specified otherwise), the following returns duly
certified by the specified auditors to Depositor Education and Awareness (DEA) Fund,
Department of Regulation, Central Office, 12th Floor, Nariman Bhavan, Vinay K Shah
Marg, Nariman Point, Mumbai - 400021, as also scanned copy in pdf form by email
to dea.fund@rbi.org.in :
(1) Form I - Monthly Statement: At the end of every month, irrespective of transfer
of deposits, the e-Kuber system will auto generate a Form I (Annex II) for a
bank (including a non-member bank) and send it to their registered e-mail ids.
enriched_requirements.object: specified otherwise), the following returns duly certified by the specified auditors to Depositor Education and Awareness (

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank (or sponsor bank on behalf of its non-member bank), after verifying the
correctness of Form I, shall submit the same online to RBI through e-Kuber
system.
enriched_requirements.object: to RBI through e-Kuber system

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Rectification Form: If a bank (sponsor bank in case of non-member bank) does
not agree with the balances given in the Form I with regard to the details of
<image>
transfers made / claims received including non-receipt of confirmation
messages, then it shall bring the same to the notice of RBI by submitting the
relevant rectification form duly signed by the two authorised officials and
certified by the bank's auditors (internal / concurrent), by post and/or email,
within two weeks from identification of such discrepancy.
enriched_requirements.object: the notice of RBI by submitting the relevant rectification form duly signed by the two authorised officials and certified by the ban

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall submit its
rectification requests in the prescribed forms, as under:
enriched_requirements.object: in the prescribed forms, as under:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Form III - Reconciliation Certificate: A bank shall, for independent and
periodical verification of the balances, at the end of March and September every
year, prepare and keep on record a Reconciliation Certificate (RC) - Form III
(Annex VII) signed by two senior officers, other than those involved in transfer
and refund claims for unclaimed deposits, and countersigned by the bank's
auditors (internal / concurrent), certifying that the balances of the bank as shown
in its general ledger tally with the amount reflected in the Fund account of RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: periodical verification of the balances, at the end of March and September every year, prepare and keep on record a Reconciliati

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This certificate shall be prepared and completed with auditor(s) certification
within a period of one month from the end of every half-year, i.e., April 30 and
October 31 respectively.
enriched_requirements.object: with auditor(s) certification within a period of one month from the end of every half-year, i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall note that submission of a copy of the latest
half-year RC (Form III) to RBI is required, only whenever a first claim of the half-
year is made by the banks and shall be submitted in Form III, which shall contain
Unique Document Identification Number (UDIN) or Internal Document
Identification Number of the bank's auditors (internal / concurrent).
enriched_requirements.object: a copy of the latest half-year RC (Form III) to RBI is required, only whenever a first claim of the half- year is made by the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To avoid any
kind of avoidable discrepancies in reconciliation of the balances in the Fund, a
bank shall take on record / account the transactions in its books on actual basis,
i.e., only after settlement of claim / transfer of amount from / to the DEA Fund
maintained by RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: account the transactions in its books on actual basis, i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(4) Annual Certificate by Statutory Auditor: An Annual Certificate (AC) indicating
item-wise details of outstanding amount due at the year-end shall be obtained
by a bank, from its Statutory Auditors in the prescribed format (Annex VIII).
enriched_requirements.object: bank, from its Statutory Auditors in the prescribed format (Annex VIII)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
same shall be submitted to RBI within one month from the date of completion of
bank's Statutory Audit but not later than September 30 of the subsequent
financial year for which the AC pertains to.
enriched_requirements.object: within one month from the date of completion of bank's Statutory Audit but not later than September 30 of the subsequent financial

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall furnish the AC, even if
it is a 'NIL' return, to the RBI within the above stipulated period.
enriched_requirements.object: if it is a 'NIL' return, to the RBI within the above stipulated period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall disclose all unclaimed liabilities (where amount due has been transferred
to Fund as also the amounts transferred to Fund in its financial statements and / or
under the Notes to Accounts as specified in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial
Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: (where amount due has been transferred to Fund as also the amounts transferred to Fund in its financial statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure all entries related to Fund are audited pre and post submission,
signed by both authorised signatories and the bank's auditors (internal / concurrent).
enriched_requirements.object: to Fund are audited pre and post submission, signed by both authorised signatories and the bank's auditors (internal / conc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On the date of transferring the amount to the Fund, a bank should maintain customer-
wise details verified by the concurrent auditors, including payment of up-to-date
interest accrued, that has been credited to the deposit account till the date of transfer
to the Fund, with respect to interest bearing deposits.
enriched_requirements.object: verified by the concurrent auditors, including payment of up-to-date interest accrued, that has been credited to the d

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With respect to non-interest
bearing deposits and other credits transferred to the Fund, customer-wise details,
duly audited, shall be maintained with the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The concurrent auditors shall also
verify and certify that, as per the banks' books, the returns have been correctly
compiled by the bank in the monthly and yearly returns submitted to RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: that, as per the banks' books, the returns have been correctly compiled by the bank in the monthly and yearly returns submitte

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The above
returns shall also be verified by the statutory auditors at the time of annual audit.
enriched_requirements.object: the statutory auditors at the time of annual audit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding anything contained in the Banking Companies (Period of
Preservation of Records) Rules, 1985, a bank shall preserve records or documents
containing details of all accounts and transactions, including deposit accounts in
respect of which amounts are required to be credited to the Fund permanently;
enriched_requirements.object: containing details of all accounts and transactions, including deposit accounts in respect of which amounts are required

conditions: where refund has been claimed from the Fund
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
where refund has been claimed from the Fund, a bank shall preserve records or
<image>
documents in respect of such accounts and transactions, for a period of at least five
years from the date of refund from the Fund.
enriched_requirements.object: documents in respect of such accounts and transactions, for a period of at least five years from the date of refund from t

conditions:
If called upon by RBI or the Committee as defined at paragraph 10(1) of these
Directions
enriched_requirements.object: amount due to the Fund

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall duly furnish the updated contact details (in case of any change) by e-
mail to dea.fund@rbi.org.in in the prescribed format (Annex IX) for any
correspondence with RBI relating to DEA Fund Scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: contact details (in case of any change) by e- mail to dea

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may refer to the Scheme notified in the Official Gazette on May 24, 2014 for
other details.
enriched_requirements.object: notified in the Official Gazette on May 24, 2014 for other details

conditions: If any issue arises in the interpretation of the provisions of the Scheme
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If any issue arises in the interpretation of the provisions of the Scheme,
the matter shall be referred to RBI, and the decision of RBI thereon shall be final.
enriched_requirements.object: and the decision of RBI thereon shall be final

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An authorised bank may enter into forward contracts with its constituents (exporters
of gold products, jewellery manufacturers, trading houses, etc.) in respect of the
underlying sale / purchase and loan transactions in gold with them.
enriched_requirements.object: with its constituents (exporters of gold products, jewellery manufacturers, trading houses, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that,
(1) the tenor of such contracts shall not exceed six months;

and
(2) the bank shall put in place appropriate risk management mechanism for the
purpose, like hedging its position either with other authorised banks or
through exchange-traded and over-the-counter hedging products available
overseas, etc., as laid down in Master Direction - Risk Management and
Inter-Bank Dealings .
enriched_requirements.object: risk management mechanism for the purpose, like hedging its position either with other authorised banks or through exchange-t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank, which also functions as a primary dealer, shall report its secondary market
transactions in corporate bonds done in OTC market, on FIMMDA's reporting
platform.
enriched_requirements.object: transactions in corporate bonds done in OTC market, on FIMMDA's reporting platform

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The bank may refer detailed operational guidelines in this regard
issued by FIMMDA.
enriched_requirements.object: in this regard issued by FIMMDA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The gross PV 01 of all non-option rupee derivative contracts (including rupee -
foreign currency contracts) of a bank shall be within 0.25 per cent of its net worth
as on the last balance sheet date.

The limit shall, however, exclude the PV 01 of
derivatives which are hedges for balance sheet exposures provided these hedges
meet the criteria of hedge effectiveness as laid down in circular
IDMC.MSRD.4801/06.01.03/2002-03 dated June 3, 2003 (as amended from time
to time).
enriched_requirements.object: PV 01 of derivatives which are hedges for balance sheet exposures provided these hedges meet the criteria of hedge effectivenes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Explanation: The bank may refer to the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Commercial Banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may defer, at its discretion, the premium on plain vanilla options and forex
option structures sold by it to users subject to the following conditions:
(1) the bank shall carry out necessary due diligence with regard to the ability
of users to adhere to the premium payment schedule, in accordance with
its Board approved policy in this regard, before extending this facility to the
users;
enriched_requirements.object: diligence with regard to the ability of users to adhere to the premium payment schedule, in accordance with its Board approved

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) premium shall be received uniformly over the maturity of the contract and
periodicity of such payment shall be at least once in a quarter.
enriched_requirements.object: the maturity of the contract and periodicity of such payment shall be at least once in a quarter

conditions: in case of forex option structures
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, in case of forex option structures, the above facility shall be available
only if the liability of the users never exceeds the net premium payable to the bank
under any scenario.
enriched_requirements.object: the liability of the users never exceeds the net premium payable to the bank under any scenario

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, the above facility shall not be available to an intermediary
bank which does not have its own option book but offers the product to corporate
clients on a completely covered basis, since intermediary banks themselves are
not 'users'.
enriched_requirements.object: intermediary bank which does not have its own option book but offers the product to corporate clients on a completely covered basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, options and option structures shall continue to be governed
by instructions on suitability and appropriateness laid down in Master Direction -
Reserve Bank of India (Market-makers in OTC Derivatives) Directions, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: by instructions on suitability and appropriateness laid down in Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Market-makers in OTC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The banks may also facilitate the process of activation of such
accounts by taking an empathetic view as indicated in Circular
DoS.CO.PPG.SEC.12/11.01.005/2024-25 dated December 2, 2024.
enriched_requirements.object: of activation of such accounts by taking an empathetic view as indicated in Circular DoS

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall take steps to circulate RBI circulars among its branches without delay,
using the fastest means available to avoid time lags, and ensure speedy
implementation of the instructions at the field level.
enriched_requirements.object: RBI circulars among its branches without delay, using the fastest means available to avoid time lags, and ensure speedy implem

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall issue suitable instructions to all its offices / branches to ensure
attendance in courts on the date of hearing wherever they are involved.
enriched_requirements.object: all its offices / branches to ensure attendance in courts on the date of hearing wherever they are involved

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also ensure that there is no delay in preferring appeals or filing affidavits
so as to avoid rejection of such applications, financial losses to the bank, and adverse
impact on public interest.
enriched_requirements.object: is no delay in preferring appeals or filing affidavits so as to avoid rejection of such applications, financial losses to the b

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To obviate the need for production of volumes of original records of the bank as
evidence in legal proceedings before the Court or any other Competent Forum and
also avoid administrative and procedural inconvenience caused in the event of such
records remaining in the custody of the Court till completion of such proceedings, a
bank may, in consultation with its Legal Adviser / Counsel, adopt the procedure as
laid down under Section 4, read with the provision of Section 2(8), of the Bankers'
Books Evidence Act, 1891.
enriched_requirements.object: its Legal Adviser / Counsel, adopt the procedure as laid down under Section 4, read with the provision of Section 2(8), of the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that, notwithstanding the provisions of the Banking Companies
(Period of Preservation of Records) Rules, 1985, original records / documents which
are the subject matter of legal proceedings are preserved at the bank's end till the
final disposal of the proceedings.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions of the Banking Companies (Period of Preservation of Records) Rules, 1985, original records / documents whi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that no money transaction of the company(ies), declared as
'defaulted companies' by the Hon'ble Patna High Court vide its order dated April 10,
2007, be permitted.
enriched_requirements.object: transaction of the company(ies), declared as 'defaulted companies' by the Hon'ble Patna High Court vide its order dated April 10,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not cite or quote from the RBI circular dated April 06, 2018 as it was set
aside by the Hon'ble Supreme Court on March 04, 2020 in the matter of Writ Petition
<image>
Explanation: A bank shall, however, continue to carry out customer due diligence
processes in line with regulations governing standards for Know Your Customer
(KYC), Anti-Money Laundering (AML), Combating of Financing of Terrorism (CFT)
and obligations of regulated entities under Prevention of Money Laundering Act,
(PMLA), 2002 in addition to ensuring compliance with relevant provisions under
Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA) for overseas remittances.
enriched_requirements.object: the RBI circular dated April 06, 2018 as it was set aside by the Hon'ble Supreme Court on March 04, 2020 in the matter of Writ Peti

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank, if not already registered with US authorities as per the Government of
India's Inter-Governmental Agreement (IGA) with US to implement Foreign
Accounts Tax Compliance Act (FATCA), shall register itself and obtain a Global
Intermediary Identification Number (GIIN).
enriched_requirements.object: a Global Intermediary Identification Number (GIIN)

conditions:
where an agreement under Model 1 has been reached in
substance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a bank having overseas branches in jurisdictions covered under different
FATCA frameworks is required to take appropriate registration actions as under:
(1) A bank having overseas branches in Model 1 jurisdictions, including those
jurisdictions where an agreement under Model 1 has been reached in
substance, and is yet to register with US authorities, shall register itself and
obtain a GIIN.
enriched_requirements.object: a GIIN

conditions: if not already registered
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A bank having overseas branches in a jurisdiction having IGA 2 agreement or
in a jurisdiction that does not have an IGA but permits financial institutions to
register and agree to an FFI agreement, may register with US authorities and
obtain a GIIN, if not already registered, to avoid potential withholding under
FATCA.
enriched_requirements.object: and obtain a GIIN

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A bank having overseas branches in a jurisdiction that does not have an IGA
and does not permit financial institutions to register and agree to an FFI
agreement may not register and their overseas branches would eventually be
subject to withholding under FATCA.
enriched_requirements.object: branches would eventually be subject to withholding under FATCA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Chapter VI - Financial Conduct and Prohibited Activities

As specified in paragraph 7(1), the Board of a bank shall formulate a policy for
allowing donations, including the purpose for which such donations may be made,
keeping in view the following instructions:
(1) A bank may make donations during a financial year aggregating up to one
per cent of the published profit of the bank for the previous year.
enriched_requirements.object: allowing donations, including the purpose for which such donations may be made, keeping in view the following instructions: (1)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) donations to Prime Minister's National Relief Fund (PMNRF),
subscriptions / contributions to professional bodies or institutions related
to banking industry like Indian Banks' Association, National Institute of
Bank Management, Indian Institute of Banking and Finance, Institute of
Banking Personnel Selection, and Foreign Exchange Dealers'
Association of India shall be excluded from the applicable ceiling
indicated above;
enriched_requirements.object: applicable ceiling indicated above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) unutilised portion of the permissible limit of one per cent shall not be
carried forward to the next year;
enriched_requirements.object: the next year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, a loss-making bank may make donations totalling ₹5
lakh only in a financial year including donations to exempted entities / funds
indicated in subparagraph (i) above.
enriched_requirements.object: lakh only in a financial year including donations to exempted entities / funds indicated in subparagraph (i) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) its Board shall determine the amount of contribution to be made to such
funds.
enriched_requirements.object: contribution to be made to such funds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, such contribution shall be reckoned for computation of
the one per cent ceiling mentioned at 49(1)(i) above;
enriched_requirements.object: of the one per cent ceiling mentioned at 49(1)(i) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) the donations out of such research and development funds may be
made for setting up professional chairs, granting fellowships or
scholarships for studies and research at universities and approved
institutions and for commissioning special projects for investigation,
<image>
analysis and research for areas pertaining to banking, finance,
statistics, management and economics, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: up professional chairs, granting fellowships or scholarships for studies and research at universities and approved institutions an

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall submit an annual review of donations to its Board.
enriched_requirements.object: of donations to its Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall follow the below-mentioned procedure for remitting contributions or
donations to the PMNRF:
(1) Each collecting branch of the bank shall send the collection to the bank's
nodal branch in New Delhi each day along with the details of the donor
cheque / draft number, address and amount of contribution, and the nodal
branch will in turn remit the funds to any of the designated branches identified
by the Prime Minister's Office (PMO) for maintaining PMNRF account.
enriched_requirements.object: for remitting contributions or donations to the PMNRF: (1) Each collecting branch of the bank shall send the coll

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Online remittance of donations may be accepted by the bank if it offers such
services.
enriched_requirements.object: bank if it offers such services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: However, this shall be displayed prominently on the bank's website.
enriched_requirements.object: the bank's website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) All these services shall be provided free of charge.
enriched_requirements.object: charge

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not accept deposits at the instance of private financiers / unincorporated
bodies under any arrangement which provides for either the issue of deposit receipts
favouring the clients of private financiers or the giving of authority by power of
attorney, nomination or otherwise for such clients to receive such deposits at maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: instance of private financiers / unincorporated bodies under any arrangement which provides for either the issue of deposit rec

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Pursuant to the Prize Chits and Money Circulation Schemes (Banning) Act, 1978
which bans the promotion and conduct of prize-chit schemes and also provides for
deterrent penalties for those who are guilty of breach of the provisions thereof, a bank
shall desist from participating or associating in such prize-chit schemes floated by
any of the non-banking financial institutions in any form.
enriched_requirements.object: associating in such prize-chit schemes floated by any of the non-banking financial institutions in any form

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, a bank shall:
(1) make enquiries with a company / firm desirous of opening such accounts,
that it is not carrying on the activities banned by the Prize Chits and Money
Circulation Schemes (Banning) Act, 1978;
enriched_requirements.object: with a company / firm desirous of opening such accounts, that it is not carrying on the activities banned by the Prize Chits and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not associate itself directly or indirectly with lottery schemes of
organisations of any description.
enriched_requirements.object: indirectly with lottery schemes of organisations of any description

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall issue necessary instructions with respect to Directions contained in
paragraph 52 to paragraph 55 to its branches for compliance.
enriched_requirements.object: respect to Directions contained in paragraph 52 to paragraph 55 to its branches for compliance

conditions:
if a bank is of the view that
a particular Income Tax Officer is exceeding their jurisdiction
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, if a bank is of the view that
a particular Income Tax Officer is exceeding their jurisdiction, the matter may be
brought to the notice of the concerned Commissioner of Income-tax.
enriched_requirements.object: notice of the concerned Commissioner of Income-tax

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, it may
be noted that Government had conveyed, vide its letter dated June 14, 1977, that
under Section 133(6) of the Income Tax Act, Income Tax Officer can call for
information regarding call deposits and fixed deposits of ₹50,000 or above, after duly
recording his reasons for making the requisition.
enriched_requirements.object: had conveyed, vide its letter dated June 14, 1977, that under Section 133(6) of the Income Tax Act, Income Tax Officer can ca

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall design need-based training programmes, seminars, or workshops to
acquaint their directors with emerging developments and challenges facing the
banking sector.
enriched_requirements.object: seminars, or workshops to acquaint their directors with emerging developments and challenges facing the banking

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall also promote awareness among its senior management
regarding security, risk and controls in computerised environment.
enriched_requirements.object: its senior management regarding security, risk and controls in computerised environment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the Board
of a bank shall ensure that its directors are exposed to the latest managerial
techniques, technological developments in banks, financial markets, risk
management systems etc., to discharge their duties to the best of their abilities.
enriched_requirements.object: are exposed to the latest managerial techniques, technological developments in banks, financial markets, risk management sys

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that, this requirement shall not be insisted upon for foreign banks.
enriched_requirements.object: foreign banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall identify specialised areas for certification of the staff manning key
responsibilities.
enriched_requirements.object: certification of the staff manning key responsibilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While a bank shall retain the flexibility to require certification for any
area of work, it shall make acquiring of a certificate course mandatory for staff before
their posting in the following areas,:
(1) treasury operations - dealers, mid-office operations;
enriched_requirements.object: require certification for any area of work, it shall make acquiring of a certificate course mandatory for staff before their

conditions: if an employee has already acquired relevant graduate
enriched_requirements.object: an accreditation/ certification

conditions: in case of work area mentioned at (5) above

where other financial sector
regulators have prescribed any certifications
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) in case of work area mentioned at (5) above, where other financial sector
regulators have prescribed any certifications, these shall be complied with.

A bank shall identify from the list of courses / certifications recognised by IBA as
meeting certification requirements for different work areas mentioned above, those
that are suitable for its operations and put in place a Board-approved policy,
mandating obtainment of such certifications by its employees working in the
respective areas.
enriched_requirements.object: of courses / certifications recognised by IBA as meeting certification requirements for different work areas mentioned above, t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall, as per the Board-approved policy referred to in paragraph 7(3) above,
prepare a list of sensitive positions to be covered under 'mandatory leave'
requirements and the list shall be reviewed periodically.
enriched_requirements.object: Board-approved policy referred to in paragraph 7(3) above, prepare a list of sensitive positions to be covered under 'mandatory leave' re

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As per the mandatory leave policy, the employees posted in sensitive positions or
areas of operation shall be compulsorily sent on leave for a few days (not less than
10 working days) in a single spell every year, without giving any prior intimation to
these employees, thereby maintaining an element of surprise.
enriched_requirements.object: leave for a few days (not less than 10 working days) in a single spell every year, without giving any prior intimation to thes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that employees, while on mandatory leave, do not have access
to any physical or virtual resources related to their work responsibilities, except
internal / corporate email which is usually available to all employees for general
purposes.
enriched_requirements.object: on mandatory leave, do not have access to any physical or virtual resources related to their work responsibilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall put in place 'staff rotation' policy.
enriched_requirements.object: rotation' policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall require its internal auditors and concurrent auditors to examine the
implementation of policies for 'staff rotation' and 'mandatory leave' and point out
instances of breaches irrespective of apparent justifications for non-compliance, if
any.
enriched_requirements.object: and concurrent auditors to examine the implementation of policies for 'staff rotation' and 'mandatory leave' and point out instances of breaches irrespective of apparent justifications for non-compliance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the decisions taken / transactions effected by officers and staff not
rotated / availing leave as per policy shall also be subjected to comprehensive
examination by the internal auditors and concurrent auditors, and the finding thereon
should be documented.
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive examination by the internal auditors and concurrent auditors, and the finding thereon should be documented

conditions: where the engagement of an expatriate exceeds the entitlement
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A foreign bank, operating in India in branch mode, shall seek specific prior approval
of RBI in any case where the engagement of an expatriate exceeds the entitlement,
which currently is as under
(1) six expatriates for their Head Office Functions in India;
enriched_requirements.object: of RBI in any case where the engagement of an expatriate exceeds the entitlement, which currently is as under (1) six exp

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
<image>
(3) for purposes of training a further number of expatriates may be allowed
provided a matching number of Indian officers are sent abroad for training in
the overseas branches.
enriched_requirements.object: matching number of Indian officers are sent abroad for training in the overseas branches

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: At the time of applying for permission to engage additional expatriates,
the bank shall furnish the details of expatriates engaged viz.
enriched_requirements.object: expatriates engaged viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall obtain from its officer staff (whether on probation, temporary /
confirmed) statements similar to those obtained by Indian banks in the public sector
under Regulation 20 of Officer Employees' (Conduct) Regulations, as amended
from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: staff (whether on probation, temporary / confirmed) statements similar to those obtained by Indian banks in the public sector

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions, and
guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to
remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

In the case of any claim for refund of part amount by the depositor whose unclaimed amount/inoperative deposit had been transferred to the Fund, the bank shall claim the entire amount transferred to the Fund in respect of such depositor along with interest payable, if any, from the Fund.
